hero.badge: Built for Junior Academy of Sciences (МАН) research
hero.title: Find, evaluate and write scientific research with a research partner that never fabricates a source.
hero.subtitle: Search six scientific databases at once, get an explained AI credibility score for every source, analyze PDFs, and get guidance grounded in official МАН requirements — never a fabricated citation.
hero.footnote: Free to start · No credit card required

features.title: Everything a research workflow needs
features.subtitle: One workspace instead of a dozen browser tabs, spreadsheets and citation managers.

search.title: Scientific Search
search.description: Query OpenAlex, CrossRef, Semantic Scholar, arXiv, PubMed and DOAJ at once. Results are deduplicated and ranked by relevance.

evaluation.title: AI Source Evaluation
evaluation.description: Every source gets a credibility, relevance and recency score with a written explanation and a clear recommendation.

pdfAnalyzer.title: PDF Analyzer
pdfAnalyzer.description: Upload a paper and get an extracted summary, methods, findings, strengths, weaknesses and suggested citations.

bibliography.title: Bibliography Checker
bibliography.description: Catch duplicate, outdated and non-scientific references before submission, with concrete fixes for each issue.

assistant.title: AI Research Assistant
assistant.description: Ask about methodology, structure, citations or defense preparation. Answers about МАН rules are grounded in the official documentation.

library.title: Personal Library
library.description: Save articles, organize research projects, and keep notes, files and bibliography together in one workspace.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: From a blank topic to a defensible research project.

step1.title: Search
step1.description: Describe your topic once. We query six scientific databases in parallel and merge the results into a single ranked list.

step2.title: Evaluate
step2.description: Ask the AI to score any source on credibility, relevance and recency — with a plain-language explanation for every score.

step3.title: Organize
step3.description: Save sources, upload PDFs and build your bibliography inside a project workspace instead of scattered files.

step4.title: Write & defend
step4.description: Get a research structure outline and ask the AI assistant about methodology, formatting and МАН defense requirements.

aiCapabilities.title: AI you can cite with confidence
aiCapabilities.subtitle: Academic integrity is the whole point. Every AI module in the platform follows the same safety rules, whether it's evaluating a source or answering a question about МАН requirements.
aiCapabilities.principle1: Never fabricates references, DOIs or citation quotations
aiCapabilities.principle2: Clearly separates verified facts from its own recommendations
aiCapabilities.principle3: Explains every score and every conclusion it gives you
aiCapabilities.principle4: Answers about МАН rules are grounded in the official uploaded documentation, not guesses
aiCapabilities.principle5: Says explicitly when it doesn't know something, instead of inventing an answer
aiCapabilities.principle6: Teaches the research process — it will not write your paper for you

q1.question: Is this only for МАН participants?
q1.answer: No. The platform works for any student or researcher writing a research paper. It includes a dedicated МАН Expert mode for participants who need to follow the official Junior Academy of Sciences requirements.

q2.question: Will the AI write my paper for me?
q2.answer: No. The AI explains concepts, evaluates sources and gives structural guidance, but it will not generate a full paper on your behalf — the platform is built to teach research skills, not replace them.

q3.question: Which databases does the search cover?
q3.answer: OpenAlex, CrossRef, Semantic Scholar, arXiv, PubMed and DOAJ. Results from all six are merged, deduplicated and ranked into a single list.

q4.question: How does the AI avoid inventing sources or rules?
q4.answer: Every AI module follows the same safety rules: it never fabricates references, DOIs or quotations, and it never invents МАН rules — it grounds its answers to МАН-specific questions in the official uploaded documentation and says so explicitly when something isn't covered there.

q5.question: Is it free to use?
q5.answer: You can register and use core research and search features for free. A premium tier with unlimited AI usage and advanced analysis is available for heavier workloads.

cta.title: Start your research today
cta.subtitle: Create a free account and search your first topic in under a minute.
